entities.name: LOW-RAINFALL CROPPING SYSTEMS
entities.description: Agricultural systems characterized by low precipitation levels.

entities.name: WATER BALANCE
entities.description: The balance between water entering and leaving a system, specifically soil water storage in the rooting zone.

entities.name: SOIL WATER STORAGE
entities.description: The amount of water stored in the soil rooting zone available for crop use.

entities.name: RISK MANAGEMENT STRATEGIES
entities.description: Strategies designed to mitigate agricultural risks in grain-based farming.

entities.name: GRAIN-BASED FARMING
entities.description: Agricultural practice focused on the production of grain crops.

entities.name: CROP-SOIL MODELING
entities.description: A cost-effective approach to understand interactions between rainfall, soil, and crop growth.

entities.name: RAINFALL
entities.description: The amount of precipitation falling in a given area.

entities.name: SOIL
entities.description: The upper layer of earth in which plants grow and water is stored.

entities.name: CROP GROWTH
entities.description: The process of a plant growing from seed to maturity.

entities.name: SOIL WATER CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of water present in the soil at specific decision points.

entities.name: FREQUENCY DOMAIN REFLECTOMETRY
entities.description: A method using FDR probes to make continuous, multi-layer soil water measurements.

entities.name: MALLEE REGION, SOUTH AUSTRALIA
entities.description: A specific geographic area in South Australia where experiments were conducted.

entities.name: NEW SOUTH WALES
entities.description: A state in Australia where experiments were conducted.

entities.name: CROP LOWER LIMIT
entities.description: The soil water content below which plants cannot extract water.

entities.name: DRAINED UPPER LIMIT
entities.description: The soil water content above which water drains freely from the soil.

entities.name: PLANT-AVAILABLE WATER CAPACITY
entities.description: The range of soil water content available for plant uptake, defined by the lower and upper limits.

entities.name: APSIM
entities.description: Agricultural Production Systems sIMulator used to simulate plant-available water and crop production.

entities.name: WHEAT
entities.description: A cereal grain crop used in the study to evaluate production simulations.

entities.name: GRAIN PRODUCTION
entities.description: The yield of grain produced by a crop.

entities.name: ROOT MEAN SQUARE ERROR
entities.description: A statistical measure used to assess the error in the prediction of grain production.

entities.name: SOIL EVAPORATION
entities.description: The process of water moving from the soil surface to the atmosphere.

entities.name: WATER REDISTRIBUTION
entities.description: The movement of water within the soil profile.

entities.name: CLIMATE RISK
entities.description: The potential for adverse effects on agriculture due to climate variability in low-rainfall environments.
